Description: Vowel-interval event table including median F1 and F2 values when extraction succeeds.
RowDefinition: One row represents one vowel interval.

onset.Description: Vowel onset time relative to run onset.

speaker.Description: Speaker identifier for the vowel interval.

vowel_label.Description: Vowel label from the documented phoneme or vowel inventory.
vowel_label.Levels: Document the inventory used by the source aligner or annotation tier.

vowel_set.Description: Name of the vowel label convention used for vowel_label.

f1_median_hz.Description: Median F1 estimate within the vowel interval.

f2_median_hz.Description: Median F2 estimate within the vowel interval.

source_interval_id.Description: Identifier from the source vowel or phoneme interval tier.

extraction_status.Description: Status of formant extraction for the row.

notes.Description: Free-text note explaining extraction failure or caveats for the row.

Source.AnnotationSource: Vowel intervals derived from a TextGrid tier and acoustic formants estimated from audio

Preprocessing: Rows restricted to vowel intervals from the source tier.
Postprocessing: Median F1 and F2 computed within each interval when stable tracks are available.
FilteringRules: Intervals shorter than the documented minimum duration receive extraction_status = too_short.
AggregationRules: F1 and F2 are medians across valid formant frames within each vowel interval.

Notes: This template is intentionally event-level. Median formants should not be documented as continuous arrays by default.
